abilities: Whenever you [keyword:Hyperspeed] this turn, you get both [icon:recruit] from [icon:recruit] icons and [icon:attack] from [icon:attack] icons.

[hc:instinct]: Choose one - Draw a card or you get +1[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Demon Sight
abilities: Guess Villain, Bystander, Strike, or Twist. Then reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If you guessed right, you get +2[icon:attack].
[team:avengers]: If it was a Villain, you may fight it this turn.

cards.name: Second Chance at Life
abilities: If a Master Strike or Scheme Twist would occur, you may discard this card from your hand instead. If you do, draw three cards, then shuffle that Strike or Twist back into the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Infrared Conversation
abilities: To play this, you must discard a card. Draw two cards.

abilities: To play this, you must discard a card.

[team:avengers][team:avengers][team:avengers][team:avengers]: Before you do that, put your discard pile on top of your deck.

[hc:covert]: [keyword:Dark Memories]

cards.name: Race to the Rescue
abilities: Choose a Hero Class. ([hc:strength],[hc:instinct],[hc:covert],[hc:tech] or [hc:ranged]) Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's the Hero Class you named, draw it. Otherwise, put it back on the top or bottom.

cards.name: Break the Sound Barrier

[hc:covert]: [keyword:Hyperspeed 6]

cards.name: Hypersonic Cannon

cards.name: Overwhelming Firepower
abilities: Whenever you defeat a Villain or Mastermind this turn, draw a card and rescue a Bystander.

cards.name: Grim Reaper
abilities: Grim Reaper gets +1[icon:attack] for each [rule:Location] card in the city.
Always Leads: Lethal Legion
Master Strike: This Strike enters the city as a 7[icon:attack] “Graveyard“ [rule:Location] that says “This gets +2[icon:attack] while there's a Villain here.“ It's Worth 5VP.

cards.name: Epic Grim Reaper
abilities: Grim Reaper gets +2[icon:attack] for each [rule:Location] card in the city.
Always Leads: Lethal Legion

Master Strike: This Strike enters the city as an 8[icon:attack] “Graveyard“ [rule:Location] that says “This gets +3[icon:attack] while there's a Villain here.“ It's worth 6VP. Then, if there are at least three Location cards in the city, each player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Carnival of Concussions
abilities: Fight: If this was not already a [rule:Location], draw three cards, and this card enters the city as a Location with this ability:
Whenever you fight a Villain here, each other player KOs a Bystander from their Victory Pile.

cards.name: Cult of Skulls
abilities: Fight: If this was not already a [rule:Location], KO up to two cards from your discard pile, and this card enters the city as a Location with this ability:
Whenever you fight a Villain here, each other player reveals their hand and discards a non-grey card.

cards.name: Maze of Bones
abilities: Fight: If this was not already a [rule:Location], look at the top four cards of your deck, KO any number of them, and put the rest back in any order. Then this card enters the city as a Location with this ability:
Whenever you fight a Villain here, each other player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Prison of Coffins
abilities: Fight: If this was not already a [rule:Location], you get +5[icon:recruit], and this card enters the city as a Location with this ability:
Whenever you fight a Villain here, each other player puts a Villain from their Victory Pile into the Escape Pile.

cards.name: The Hood
abilities: [keyword:Dark Memories]
Always Leads: Hood's Gang
Master Strike: Each player reveals the top 6 cards of their deck, discards all the non-grey Heroes revealed, and puts the rest back in any order.

cards.name: Epic Hood
abilities: [keyword:Double Dark Memories]
Always Leads: Hood's Gang
Master Strike: Each player discards their deck, then shuffles 6 random grey cards from their discard pile to form their new deck.

cards.name: Demonic Revelation
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals their hand and discards a non-grey Hero.

cards.name: Focus Magic Through Guns
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals a [hc:covert] Hero or discards a card.
Then each other player reveals a [hc:tech] Hero or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Paean to Dormammu
abilities: Fight: Each other player discards their deck.

cards.name: The Hood's Warehouse
abilities: Fight: If this was not already a [rule:Location], rescue 4 Bystanders, and this card enters the city as a Location with this ability:
When you fight a Villain here, play another card from the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Mandarin
abilities: All Mandarin's Rings get +1[icon:attack].
Mandarin gets -1[icon:attack] for each Mandarin's Ring among all players' Victory Piles. (-3[icon:attack] for each in solo.)
Always Leads: Mandarin's Rings
Master Strike: Each player chooses a Mandarin's Ring from their Victory Pile to enter the city. Any player who didn't have a Ring gains a Wound instead.

cards.name: Epic Mandarin
abilities: All Mandarin's Rings get +2[icon:attack].
Mandarin gets -2[icon:attack] for each Mandarin's Ring among all players' Victory Piles. (-6[icon:attack] for each in solo.)
Always Leads: Mandarin's Rings
Master Strike: Each player chooses a Mandarin's Ring from their Victory Pile to enter the city. Any player who didn't have a Ring gains a Wound to the top of their deck instead.

cards.name: Circles Unbroken
abilities: Fight: Draw a card for each Mandarin's Ring in your Victory Pile.

cards.name: Dragon of Heaven Spaceship
abilities: Fight: If this was not already a [rule:Location], KO up to two of your Heroes, and this card enters the city as a Location with this ability:
Whenever you fight a Villain here, each other player reveals their hand and KOs one of their non-grey Heroes.
Fight: KO up to two of your Heroes.

cards.name: Intertwining Powers
abilities: Fight: Each other player without at least two Mandarin's Rings in their Victory Pile gains a Wound.

cards.name: Rings Seek Their True Hand
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals a [hc:tech] Hero or puts a Mandarin's Ring from their Victory Pile into the Escape Pile.

abilities: While in the Bank or Streets, this card's name is “Dr. Calvin Zabo“, and you muist spend [icon:recruit] to fight him instead of [icon:attack].
Fight: KO pne of your Heroes.

Fight: Draw two cards.

cards.name: Count Nefaria

Escape: Same Effect.

cards.name: Blackout
abilities: Ambush: Each player reveals a [hc:ranged] Hero or discards a card.
Fight: Draw two cards.

cards.name: Ares
abilities: [keyword:Last Stand]
Fight: KO one of your Heroes.

cards.name: Dark Hawkeye (Bullseye)
abilities: [keyword:Last Stand]
Fight: KO one of your Heroes. Then choose one:
- Each other player KOs one of their Heroes.

Fight: Each other player discards two cards, then draws a card.

cards.name: Sentry
abilities: While in the Bank or Streets, this card's name is “The Void“, it gets +5[icon:attack], and it gets “Fight: KO up to two cards from your discard pile.“
Escape: Each player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Sentry's Watchtower
abilities: Villains here get [keyword:Last Stand]. (Villains who already have it get the bonus again.)
Fight: You gain the Hero on the HQ space under this.

cards.name: Chemistro
abilities: [keyword:Dark Memories]
Fight: Exchange a card you played this turn with a card in the HQ that has the same or lower cost. (The card you gained goes to your discard pile.)

Ambush: Guess Villain, Bystander, Strike, or Twist.  Then reveal the top card of the Villain Deck.  If you guessed wrong, play that card.

abilities: Villains here get [keyword:Dark Memories]. (Villains who already have it get the bonus again.)
Fight: Take another turn after this one.

abilities: Whenever you fight a Villain here, each other player chooses a Bystander from their Victory Pile to be captured by Carnival of Wonders.

abilities: Fight: Draw a card.

abilities: Fight: You may KO a card from your discard pile.

cards.name: Influence, The Impact Beam
abilities: Fight: You get +1[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Liar, The Mento-Intensifier
abilities: Fight: Look at the top card of another player's deck. Say it is “Good“ or “Bad.“ That player chooses to put it in your discard pile or their discard pile.

cards.name: Lightning, The Electro-Blast
abilities: Fight: Reveal the top card of your deck. You may KO it.

cards.name: Nightbringer, The Black Light
abilities: Fight: Reveal the top three cards of the Villain Deck. You may defeat a Villain you revealed worth 2VP or less. (Do its Fight effect.) Put the rest back in any order.

cards.name: Remaker, The Matter Rearranger
abilities: Fight: You may choose a card from your hand or discard pile. The player on your right puts it in their hand.

cards.name: Spectral, The Disintegration Beam
abilities: Fight: KO one of your Heroes.

cards.name: Spin, The Vortex Beam
abilities: Fight: Reveal the top six cards of your deck. Discard all of them that cost 0, then put the rest back in any order.

cards.name: Zero, The Ice Blast
abilities: Fight: Choose a card you played this turn that costs 0. When you draw a new hand of cards at the end of this turn, add that card to your hand as an extra card.
Setup: 11 Twists. Add an extra Villain Group.
Special Rules: There are two extra “Low Tide“ city spaces on the left side of the city, so the city has 7 spaces total.
Twist: The tide rushes in. This Scheme [rule:Transforms].
Evil Wins: When 3 Villains per player have escaped or the Villain Deck runs out.

Special Rules: The Low Tide, Bridge, and Streets city spaces no longer exist. The city has 3 spaces total. Put this Scheme on the Streets to mark the edge of the city. Villains in destroyed city spaces escape, starting from the left.
Twist: The tide rushes out. This Scheme [rule:Transforms], then play another card from the Villain Deck.
Evil Wins: When 3 Villains per player have escaped or the Villain Deck runs out.

Setup: 8 Twists. Hero Deck is 4[team:x-men] Heroes and 2 non-[team:x-men] Heroes. (Or substitute another team for all [team:x-men] icons on both sides.) Add 14 Scarlet Witch Hero cards to the Villain Deck.
Special Rules: Each Scarlet Witch in the city is a Villain with [icon:attack] equal to its [icon:vp]+3. If you fight one, gain it as a Hero.
Twist: KO all non-[team:x-men] Heroes from the HQ. If there are at least 2 Scarlet Witch cards in the city, this Scheme [rule:Transforms]. Otherwise play another card from the Villain Deck.
Special Rules: Each Scarlet Witch in the city is a Villain with [icon:attack] equal to its [icon:vp]+4. If you fight one, gain it as a Hero.
Twist: KO all [team:x-men] Heroes from the HQ. Play another card from the Villain Deck.
Evil Wins: When the number of non-grey Heroes in the KO pile is ten plus double the number of players.
Setup: 30 Officers in the S.H.I.E.L.D. Officer stack. 1 player: 7 Twists. 2-3 players: 9 Twists. 4-5 players: 11 Twists.
Special Rules: Officers stacked next to this Scheme are “Hydra Sympathizers.“ You may pay 3[icon:recruit] to have the player of your choice gain one as a Hero.
Twist: For each Twist in the KO pile (including this one), put a card from the S.H.I.E.L.D. Officer stack next to this Scheme. Then this Scheme [rule:Transforms].
Special Rules: Officers next to this Scheme are 3[icon:attack] “Hydra Traitor“ Villains. When you fight one, return it to the Officer Stack and KO one of your Heroes.
Twist: For each Twist in the KO pile (including this one), put a card from the S.H.I.E.L.D. Officer stack next to this Scheme, Then if Evil hasn't won yet, this Scheme [rule:Transforms].
Evil Wins: When there are 15 Officers next to this Scheme or the S.H.I.E.L.D. Officer Stack runs out.
Setup: 8 Twists.
Twist: Each player must discard down to four cards or KO a Bystander from their Victory Pile to “search for the Korvac Entity.“ This Scheme [rule:Transforms].
Special Rules: This Scheme counts as a 19[icon:attack] “Korvac“ Villain worth 9VP. If you defeat Korvac, KO the Mastermind and all its Tactics.
Twist: 2,4,6: Each player discards an [team:avengers] Hero or gains a Wound. This Scheme [rule:Transforms].
Twist 8: Evil Wins!
When you rescue this Bystander, each player reveals the top card of their deck. Judge one of those cards to be the “best in show.“ That player draws that card.

When you rescue this Bystander, reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Draw each of them that has at least 10 words of rules text. Put the rest back in any order. (Numerals, icons, and punctuation don't count.)
When you rescue this Bystander, choose [icon:recruit] or [icon:attack]. Then [keyword:Hyperspeed 3] for that icon.
